selections.name: Miss Scandal (NZ)
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 3 for the tight Canterbury circuit. Gets the services of Tyler Schiller for the Waller yard and has valuable race experience.

selections.name: Satin Serenade
selections.reason: First starter from the Waller yard drawing the inside rail. Trials have been solid and gets Tim Clark aboard to utilize the jump and run bias.

selections.name: Extremely Chic
selections.reason: Placed on debut here on heavy going. The wide draw is a negative on this track, but she has obvious ability and fitness.

selections.name: Excelluna
selections.reason: Experienced filly drawing well in barrier 2. Deep into her prep and maps well to feature in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Bravira
danger_horse.reason: First starter for Waller with Tommy Berry riding. Must be respected if there is a market push.

selections.name: The Machine Gun
selections.reason: Drawn beautifully in barrier 3. The Snowden yard is lethal with 2yos and Tim Clark is an elite front-running jockey for this track.

selections.name: Ultimate Warrior
selections.reason: Another first starter drawn perfectly inside. The Freedman stable has an impressive strike rate with debutants.

selections.name: Moon Lander
selections.reason: Waller runner drawing well. Trials have been quiet but from a top stable and worth watching for a market push.

selections.name: Exit Clause
selections.reason: Placed on debut at long odds. The wide draw is a concern here, but has race fitness and upside.

danger_horse.name: Klocke
danger_horse.reason: Won a recent trial and expected to go close on debut for Waller.

selections.name: Hello Captain (NZ)
selections.reason: Won impressively last start and draws perfectly in barrier 4. Nash Rawiller takes the ride for Waller. Progressive and the one to beat.

selections.name: Roma Green
selections.reason: Unbeaten in two starts and draws well. Up in class but has tactical speed which is crucial at Canterbury.

selections.name: Wootton Way
selections.reason: Consistent filly who ran well here last start. Tommy Berry rides and she will be closing hard.

selections.name: Events
selections.reason: Maher runner with solid form. Chad Schofield takes the ride and she maps to get a good run.

danger_horse.name: Airworthy
danger_horse.reason: Waterhouse/Bott runner with early speed, but the wide draw is a massive hurdle on this tight track.

selections.name: Deepwater Artist (NZ)
selections.reason: Won well last start and draws perfectly in barrier 2. Can utilize early speed to control the race from the inside.

selections.name: Pawa
selections.reason: Won last start and gets the ultimate rail draw. Rachel King will have him prominent early.

selections.name: Rach
selections.reason: Won last start for Waller. The wide draw is tricky, but she has the class to overcome it if she gets luck.

selections.name: Lipstick
selections.reason: Drawn well and gets Adam Hyeronimus. Drops in class and should get a soft run.

danger_horse.name: Ballpark
danger_horse.reason: Waller runner drawing well with Tim Clark. Can improve third-up.

selections.name: Format
selections.reason: Waterhouse/Bott runner ready to peak third-up. Has tactical speed to overcome the middle draw and dictate terms.

selections.name: Lots To Love (IRE)
selections.reason: Gets the inside draw and drops sharply in weight. Consistent form makes him a major player.

selections.name: Luskaire
selections.reason: Drops in class and draws well. Capable of bouncing back to his best form here.

selections.name: Jack Duggan (USA)
selections.reason: Placed last start and draws well. Veteran who knows how to win.

danger_horse.name: Allegro Miss
danger_horse.reason: Narrowly beaten last start over this track and trip. Must be respected.

selections.name: Deepwater Artist (NZ)
selections.reason: Dual acceptor who looks very well placed here. Won last start and draws perfectly to utilize his tactical speed.

selections.name: Louie's Legacy
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start and draws well. Proven in this grade and will be in the finish.

selections.name: The Creator (NZ)
selections.reason: Consistent performer who ran second last start. The wide draw is the only negative.

selections.name: Lennox (IRE)
selections.reason: Resuming but has a good fresh record. Draws perfectly inside.

danger_horse.name: Horizons
danger_horse.reason: Gets the rail draw and can improve second-up.

selections.name: Celui
selections.reason: Class runner of the field resuming. Draws perfectly in barrier 2 for this tight sprint and has an excellent fresh record.

selections.name: Dollar Magic
selections.reason: Drawn well and capable of bouncing back. Has the class to feature heavily in this lineup.

selections.name: Memoria
selections.reason: Resuming with a good fresh record. Draws well enough to be prominent early.

selections.name: Winning Proposal
selections.reason: Gets the ultimate inside draw which is gold at Canterbury. Can improve sharply.

danger_horse.name: Storm The Ramparts
danger_horse.reason: Classy gelding but the extreme wide draw over 5 1/2f here is a massive disadvantage.

selections.name: Mafia
selections.reason: Won last start and draws perfectly in barrier 2. Maps to get the run of the race and is the one to beat.

selections.name: Laurel Hill
selections.reason: Won last start over this track and trip. Gets the rail draw and will be very hard to hold out.

selections.name: Love Shuck
selections.reason: Ran second last start and draws well. Holding form and gets a good setup today.

selections.name: Tuscany
selections.reason: Won last start and looks progressive. Up in class but has upside.

danger_horse.name: Pentagon (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Resuming from a good draw. Trialled well and can sprint fresh.
